overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player exits a tunnel into bright sunlight, crosses a commercial street with towering buildings and neon signage, then follows a waterfront promenade with palm trees and marina views.

events.description: exiting tunnel into bright sunlight, dramatic lighting transition from dark to bright

agents.ego_description: walking through the underpass toward the tunnel exit and bright light ahead

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the underpass with visible structural beams
orange neon sign with 'CALIENTE' text on the tunnel wall
concrete walls with horizontal orange stripes

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a concrete underpass tunnel with artificial lighting. The camera moves forward toward the bright exit, passing an orange 'CALIENTE' neon sign on the left wall. The tunnel walls feature horizontal orange stripes, and the road surface is asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with neon signage and crosswalk

events.description: approaching and crossing the pedestrian crosswalk with yellow stripes
turning left to navigate around police car parked on the street

agents.ego_description: walking across the commercial street toward a large building with bright signage, then turning left past a police vehicle

notable_agents.action: police car parked on the street with officers standing nearby

entered.detail: tall blue commercial building with 'Fuyutsuki' signage in red neon
large purple and pink neon sign reading 'FINNIE DAY'S' on the building facade
futuristic black and white police vehicle with emergency lights

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel into bright sunlight, the scene opens onto a futuristic commercial street. The camera approaches a large building with prominent 'Fuyutsuki' and 'FINNIE DAY'S' neon signage. After crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk, the camera turns left to navigate around a parked police car with officers nearby, transitioning toward the waterfront area.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront pedestrian promenade with palm trees and parked cars

events.description: transitioning from urban street to waterfront walkway with view of water

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade passing other pedestrians and palm trees

entered.detail: concrete barrier separating the walkway from the water
body of water visible beyond the railing with reflections
low-rise modern building with horizontal lines and reflective windows
massive towering skyscraper with geometric architecture dominating the skyline

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a wide waterfront promenade with palm trees lining the path. To the left, a concrete railing separates the walkway from the marina water, while futuristic buildings and a massive skyscraper dominate the skyline ahead. The area is less crowded than the commercial street, with sparse pedestrian traffic and parked cars visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: marina overlook with docked boats and distant bridge

events.description: panning left to look at the marina with docked boats and water
panning back to forward facing to continue along the path

agents.ego_description: pausing to look out at the marina with docked boats, then continuing along the waterfront path

entered.detail: wooden docks extending into the water with moored boats
small boats and watercraft tied to the marina docks
large bridge structure visible in the distance across the water

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left to reveal a marina with wooden docks and small boats moored in the water. A distant bridge is visible across the water, and palm trees line the promenade. After observing the waterfront view, the camera turns back to continue along the path, with the modern office building now appearing further in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim confines of an industrial underpass into a bright, sprawling futuristic cityscape and its accompanying waterfront. It begins inside a concrete tunnel with artificial lighting and orange stripes, moving past a neon Caliente sign toward a blindingly bright exit. As the camera emerges into the sunlight, the scene opens onto a commercial street dominated by Fuyutsuki and Finnie Day's signage, crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk and navigating around a parked police car. The environment then shifts toward a wide waterfront promenade lined with palm trees and a concrete railing, with a massive skyscraper looming over the skyline. Finally, the camera pans left to reveal a marina with wooden docks and moored boats before turning back to continue along the path toward distant modern office buildings.
